reviews.text: Had our roof replaced and I wasn't disappointed is an understatement. From the first call to completion, I felt I was personally looked after. David, Morgan, Brendan and team were all absolute professionals at their work. They were prompt, polite, friendly and competent. Stunned by how fast and efficiently they work with our whole roof replaced in 3 days (including 1 rain day) and the whole job done in 5 working days. Felt safe at all times that the work was top class. These guys also had the best price by a significant amount. Would recommend to anyone!

We have had a wonderful experience with Queensland Roofing (we mostly dealt with Morgan who was fantastic to speak to and deal with), from first point of contact right through to completion of the job. They are very honest, reliable and professional and we will definitely be contacting them again when we need future maintenance or jobs done for our roof. Many thanks again. ^_^

Overall, the experience was excellent. Justin and David are very knowledgeable, professional, and responsive. Justin's assessment during the quoting process was very thorough. He answered all my questions, and proposed several solutions to the challenges we presented. After reviewing several companies that we got in to quote our roof, Queensland Roofing was our top pick because of the extra information they gave to us, it didn't feel like we were just another job to them. Not only did they do a terrific job of replacing our cracked tiles and installing new clips, they made every effort to clean-up all debris. I would highly recommend Justin and David from Queensland Roofing!

Many thanks to Morgan who repaired our leaking roof in January.  We had no rain to truly test the repair until the remains of Cyclone Debbie dumped over 300mm on us in 24 hours at the end of March.  Not a single drop of water came through our ceiling, so I consider that a job extremely well tested and very well done.  We appreciate the good work.

We recently had Queensland Roofing attend to our leaking roof following the heavy rain and storms earlier in the year. David initially did a thorough inspection of the roof and provided a detailed quote on works to be completed. Then together with his team, Greg and Allan, job was completed above and beyond our expectation. Their work ethic and professionalism  was very refreshing. I have since recommended Queensland Roofing to others in our street.

David, Morgan and the team were great to deal with. Sarking my roof was a big job and the constant rain delays made it an elongated process, but the quality and workmanship was faultless.

We did have a few issues with the railing going up and coming down, and there was a stuff up on the invoice which they chased me for, but all in all minor. Would recommend them and would definitely use their services again.

Morgan was not just a pleasure to deal with, but I felt reassured and confident in his genuine desire to help me out of a bind (when several other tradies let me down).  I needed to get some urgent termite damage repair work done as part of completing settlement on the sale of my house. It was a small job so I tried a number of chippies and small businesses. After several no shows; being spoken to rudely; and being told too busy to do this, I finally resorted to ringing Qld Roofing. Morgan had genuine interest in helping me out. Despite being fully booked themselves, he made time to meet me at the house, quote the work, organize someone to fix some roof tiles for me as well and spend personal time on the weekend trying to get this done. David was working behind the scenes too and after my previous experience with the players in this space, I was blown away by their genuine concern and care to help me personally, and provide a quality job.  I have no hesitation in recommending Morgan and Queensland Roofing. If they show this level of service for a small job, whilst they’re already busy, then you know that genuine care and quality is just baked-in to their culture. Thanks again Morgan.

Have yet to engage their services however approached Queensland Roofing for advice and rough estimates for removal of asbestos ceiling for a potential house purchase. Morgan was very helpful and provided some good advice on options for moving forward. Very happy to find a company willing to assist me even though I do not own the property yet. Will definitely be approaching them when the time comes to do the work.

We engaged Queensland Roofing to undertake some preventative maintenance to the Colorbond roof of a property we purchased. We dealt with Morgan and he provided a great service. He kept us informed, answered all of our questions, and clearly explained the potential issues such as colour matching to an existing faded roof. He was always punctual or called in advance if there was likely to be a hold up. Most importantly he made sure the small details were covered, which are often overlooked and cause issues later. I would use Queensland Roofing again for any future work.

My roof restoration was completed last month and I have to say I am very impressed with the work carried out by Justin.  There were 2 sections of roof which required replacing because of leaks plus the ridge capping which was rusted.    Justin advised that I didn't need to replace the whole roof and explained in detail what was required.  My roof looks amazing without the cost of a full roof replacement.  I would highly recommend Queensland Roofing to anyone who needs any work done on their roof.

I had to have my full roof replaced due to insurance company not covering damages because it was passed serviceable life span. I dealt with Morgan from beginning to end, every conversation was thorough and well comunicated. I live interstate so this was very important to me. I had a few quotes on the replacement and Morgan was able to price match using same materials. The job was organised and completed before some other companies could even begin to start. Very well organised team and definitely recommend. Thanks again for your work.

We recently bought an older house and hired QLD Roofing to replace  our gutters and roof valleys. Morgan's advice was honest and straight forward.  Unfortunately for the boys, the big storm hit when they were right in the middle of the job. They diverted the water away from the house until the storm passed and kept us up to date on their progress throughout.

I found the guys at Queensland Roofing fair and completely honest when working through and quoting on our roof damage. After a two previous quotes, which left us a little confused, David and the team broke down in simple terms what work actually had to be done, cost and time frame. It turned out it was much less than we were previously advised, meaning a happy wife and wallet!
Thanks David, double thumbs up from me.Trust is a must!

They made a time to come out and quote but never turned up.
EDIT: Immediately after posting this review I was contacted by the company who looked into it and admitted to simply forgetting the appointment as they were very busy at the time. They have since been out to quote on the job and it turns out they can't do the repairs as the roof is too far gone (original roof from the 1880s so this I certainly will accept). Anyway, other than initially forgetting the appointment they have been very straight forward and were certainly apologetic about their mistake. I get the impression that their mistake was more the exception rather than the rule with these guys; this can't be said for a lot of tradies I've dealt with.

Exceptional service! Can not recommend them enough. I found the customer service to be fantastic and Morgan was a pleasure to work with. He kept me informed every step of the way as to what was happening. I would definitely go through them again if I have any issues and recommend them to all my family and friends. Super friendly crew and excellent workmanship.

They went way above and beyond in understanding my requirements. I was under the impression that painting a roof had benefits beyond cosmetic appearance that was perpetrated by another company. Queensland Roofing provided me with a document from the Queensland government addressing that exact myth and rather than preying on my ignorance for a quick sale, they decided to educate me to ensure I was getting the best service and product for my needs; a true rarity in today's world. Thank you!

I don't usually comment on contractors online but in this case I will make an exception as Queensland Roofing are Fantastic! The workmanship was professional and the job was done in realistic a time frame and their service is great. Attention to detail that's for sure!

Rob C

Job was properly quoted with photos and supporting detail. Had a couple of false starts when the materials didn't arrive, however the overall time from quote to job complete was much quicker than expected. The job was done well and overall I'm happy with the result. Good experience.

I would use them again.
I found Dave to be by far one of the most knowledgeable experts in the roofing industry. Very happy that we chose Queensland Roofing and the outcome was by far outstanding thank you again.
Very happy with the job done. Justin does great work and is a friendly guy. He was happy to do a couple extra things to make the roof look nice. Thanks Justin and the rest of the team.
Thanks to Morgan and the team and Queensland Roofing for helping get a new roof onto our first home. Communication was great and had every step of the process explained. Cheers
Honesty and great advice from Dave. Appreciate it seems hard to find in the roofing industry from my investigation.

David went out of his way to help me. I was overseas and unable to  be present when the quoting and job was done. David rang me overseas several times to keep me updated about what was happening. Thanks again David.
Dave is very experienced and knowledgeable. He provided  some valuable advice even though he didn't have enough resources to do our big project.
These guys got back to me in a timely manner, turned up when they said they would, did the job without any issues.  Could not ask for anything more.  100% satisfied.
They are the best roofers around. I have used them previously and will not let anyone else now do any work for me but theml
The team had done a fantastic job in refreshing & transforming my roof at home. Thumbs up to David, Morgan and Alan!
I know that Tradies are busy. Floods, winds etc. Still waiting for someone to get back to me to arrange a quote for a small job.
Said they would come between 1 and 3,  so cancelled plans as I really needed help. They were a no-show. No call, no contact. Cannot stand this kind of arrogance and disrespect for customers.
Thanks to Qld Roofing Pty Ltd for the helpful advice about a roofing issue.
While looking for quotes, Morgan went out of his way to help me with information and advice. Great customer service
The owner himself called me back after a delay in receiving a response. I appreciate the personal touch to a customer's concern

analysis.summary: Customers consistently praise the team's professionalism, speed, and thoroughness, with specific highlights on storm damage repairs and complete roof replacements. The reviews reflect high trust in the company's integrity and work quality, with no negative feedback present in this sample.

analysis.owner_reply_observations: No owner replies are visible in the provided sample data, suggesting either a lack of engagement or that replies are not included in this specific export.
redesign_hooks: Feature the '3-day replacement' statistic prominently to address customer anxiety about project timelines.
Use the Cyclone Debbie repair story as a case study for durability and weather resistance.
Highlight the 'thorough inspection' process to differentiate from competitors who may offer quick, superficial quotes.
